Usage: BlobCleaner <Command>

Commands:
  azure clean    Clean azure blob
  db clean       Clean database
  get            Get azure blob information

result.stdout:
Usage: azure clean [options...]

Clean azure blob

Options:
  -c, --connectionstring <String>    Connection string (Required)
  -f, --force                        Clean full blob if true (Optional)
  -v, --verbose                      Set output to verbose messages (Optional)
